title: Agentic market-intelligence landscape
research_scope: Compare direct PM platforms, adjacent work platforms, deep-research products, and CI tools on capability depth and governance posture.

rows.name: Jira Product Discovery
rows.grounding_model: Idea, page, and workflow context inside Atlassian
rows.implication: ProductOS should differentiate above embedded drafting and delivery linkage.

rows.name: Productboard Spark
rows.pricing_signal: Enterprise SaaS with beta AI expansion
rows.grounding_model: Productboard initiatives, competitors, personas, docs, and feedback
weaknesses: Less explicit validation language than ProductOS needs
rows.implication: ProductOS needs PM-native research framing, not only generic AI research.

rows.name: Aha! Knowledge AI
rows.positioning: AI search and assistant features with account controls
rows.grounding_model: Published articles and account-controlled workspace data
rows.governance_posture: Explicit AI controls and access scope
rows.implication: Governance and source-access controls should be first-class in ProductOS.

rows.name: Linear Asks
rows.positioning: Issue flow connected to customer asks and support threads
rows.grounding_model: Asks, cases, Slack threads, and customer identity
rows.governance_posture: Workflow attribution and linked customer context
rows.implication: ProductOS should ingest asks and keep attribution when converting them into research signals.

rows.name: Notion MCP
rows.grounding_model: Real-time page read and write access
rows.implication: ProductOS should support agent-readable context with stricter write boundaries.

rows.name: Coda AI
rows.positioning: Connected work assistant across integrated docs and tasks
rows.implication: ProductOS should unify retrieval, synthesis, and execution but keep PM-native validation stronger.

rows.name: Asana AI Teammates
rows.positioning: Context-aware AI teammates for team workflows
rows.grounding_model: Team context with checkpoints and scoped access
rows.implication: Checkpointed autonomous work should be normal in ProductOS research agents.

rows.name: OpenAI Deep Research
rows.grounding_model: User-scoped web, files, and connected apps
rows.governance_posture: Source choice, plan preview, and progress visibility
rows.implication: ProductOS should offer PM-native deep research with explicit source control and evidence output.

rows.name: Gemini Deep Research
rows.positioning: Mainstream AI report generation for complex topics
rows.grounding_model: Gemini app and web research flow
rows.implication: General-purpose deep research is becoming table stakes, not differentiation.

rows.name: Perplexity Deep Research
rows.positioning: Iterative search, reasoning, and report export
rows.grounding_model: Web search, document reading, iterative planning
rows.governance_posture: Visible deep-research mode and export flow
rows.implication: ProductOS should combine export-ready research with stronger organizational memory and validation.

rows.name: Glean Agentic Engine
rows.implication: ProductOS should ground research in workspace memory and canonical product context.

rows.name: Crayon
rows.pricing_signal: B2B revenue and PMM software pricing
rows.grounding_model: Competitive data, call recordings, saved searches, templates
rows.implication: ProductOS should borrow monitoring and repeatable search patterns, then layer PM-specific decision traceability on top.

rows.name: Klue
rows.positioning: Verified competitive intelligence and deal support
rows.grounding_model: CRM, calls, internal docs, win-loss, and public sources
rows.governance_posture: Verified-insight narrative over mixed source tiers
strengths: Research mode over internal and external inputs
rows.implication: ProductOS should support verified mixed-source synthesis across public and internal evidence.

rows.name: Semrush EyeOn
rows.grounding_model: Competitor blogs, ads, pages, and social feeds
rows.implication: ProductOS can start with lightweight deltas, but must translate them into PM-useful implications.
